business_hours: Re open monday through friday: 7:30 AM - 6:00 PM | On saturdays we do: 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM | 30 am to 6 pm weekdays, and: 8 AM - 4 PM
emergency_definition: there is a major flood in the house, a sewage backup into the home, or a total loss of water supply.
emergency_routing_rules: Transfer to our Shop Foreman at 555-0800
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet -> Verify Emergency -> If Emergency: Collect Address/Name/Phone & Escalated Transfer -> If Non-Emergency: Message for Morning
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet -> Identify Caller -> Collect Inquiry -> Attempt Transfer -> Fallback Message
